WHAT IS THIS

A bird has been slamming its face into this kitchen window in Canby, Oregon for over a week straight. We don't know why. The bird doesn't know why. Nobody knows why.

So naturally we set up a 24/7 live stream to document the entire ordeal in real time.

THE FACTS

Location: Kitchen window, Canby, OR
Duration: 8+ days and counting
Reason: Unknown / possibly grievances
Window damage: None (window winning)
Bird status: Alive, determined, unwell

FREQUENTLY ASKED

Is the bird okay? Medically, probably. Mentally, unclear.

Will the bird stop? Eight days of evidence suggests no.

Why? Birds sometimes attack their own reflection. Or this one just hates glass.
